sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52904" key="kalwnume/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰλωνῠμ-έομαι</orth>, <sense id="n52904.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be in good repute, bear a good name</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:2:32" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.32</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
